title: Translating Natural Language to SQL
scenario: Translate the following natural language query into a SQL query that fetches the customer data from the 'customers' table. The query is: 'Get all customers who live in New York City and have an age greater than 30.' The result should be a SQL query that fetches the desired data.
constraints: Must use the SELECT statement for fetching customer data
Must use the WHERE clause to filter customers by location and age

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the translated SQL query fetches the correct customer data.
Assess the SQL query's readability and adherence to best practices.
Check if the SQL query correctly interacts with the database.
